commonCitations.tort_claims_act_notice: M.G.L. c. 258, § 4 (presentment to executive officer of public employer)
commonCitations.tort_claims_act_deadline_days: 730 days presentment; 3 years to sue (M.G.L. c. 258, § 4)
commonCitations.certificate_of_merit_medmal: M.G.L. c. 231, § 60B (medical malpractice tribunal offer of proof)
commonCitations.damages_cap_medmal_noneconomic: M.G.L. c. 231, § 60H ($500,000 non-economic cap, waivable on special findings)
commonCitations.threshold_serious_injury: M.G.L. c. 231, § 6D (tort threshold: $2,000 medical OR death, dismemberment, permanent disfigurement, loss of sight/hearing, fracture)
